title: Cyrtopodium micranthum
taxonomy: Cyrtopodium micranthum is classified as a species of orchid, specifically within the genus Cyrtopodium and the family Orchidaceae. The genus Cyrtopodium is a group of terrestrial orchids native to the tropical and subtropical regions of the Americas. This species is further classified as a member of the subtribe Cynochiridinae, which is a subgroup of the tribe Cranichideae. The classification of Cyrtopodium micranthum reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary relationships with other orchid species. Cyrtopodium micranthum's classification is subject to ongoing research and revision in the field of botany.
